creator: nmh@t3x.org
text:
A few minutes ago I wrote:
> Update to version 2006-09-13.

Please make that 2006-09-17.

Here's a new diff:
>Fix:

diff -ru lang/alisp.old/Makefile lang/alisp/Makefile
--- lang/alisp.old/Makefile	Tue Sep 12 21:07:19 2006
+++ lang/alisp/Makefile	Sun Sep 17 21:50:02 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	alisp
-PORTVERSION=	20060912
+PORTVERSION=	20060917
 CATEGORIES=	lang devel lisp
 MASTER_SITES=	http://t3x.org/files/
 
diff -ru lang/alisp.old/distinfo lang/alisp/distinfo
--- lang/alisp.old/distinfo	Tue Sep 12 21:07:19 2006
+++ lang/alisp/distinfo	Sun Sep 17 21:50:02 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (alisp-20060912.tar.gz) = 6d503acc098f22d25957ce4e3e9b6106
-SIZE (alisp-20060912.tar.gz) = 71175
-SHA256 (alisp-20060912.tar.gz) = 2e9c8efda1f44da0c2213bd6a650b1a026af40748e3f7da41308617cdab7b729
+MD5 (alisp-20060917.tar.gz) = 0a40b92ee86c305f42150026f95fcc69
+SIZE (alisp-20060917.tar.gz) = 71551
+SHA256 (alisp-20060917.tar.gz) = adaa708606516f7d81124d2b2a97507f6e5bceef5128ac1a7f43e96b4b7b7edb

--
